creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Created attachment 245598
Listing of spamassassin WRKSRC

Thanks Cy.  Visually I checked your output of Mk/bsd.ports.mk to mine and couldn't see any differences so I performed a "git diff main -- Mk" and didn't see anything related, but I will continue to investigate that area.  I also copied my Mk tree from the 12.4 to a 13.2 machine, and diff'ed it, nothing obvous.  Perhaps I've placed a "[[:space:]]" somewhere? :-/
I tar'ed and xz -9 the wrksrc but it was 4.6Mm too big to upload, so I've enclosed an ls -R of it; both the sql and ldap source folders are populated.  I then git updated the ports on both 12.4 and 13.2 both continue to demonstrate the problem. 
I'm looking more closely into my env as I can't rule out the problem being at my end, instead of it (just) being a trivial error with the port :)
